free_text: Inelastic Scattering of 17.5 MeV Protons from V-51,
/by Authors/.The Cross Sections were Normalized by
Both Measuring the Integrated Charge Collected and by
Measuring the Counting Rate For Elastic Scattering in
A Monitor Detector Fixed at 90 Degree, where a Maximum
In the Elastic Angular Distribution is Found. The Two
Target Thicknesses were Measured by the Degradation of
The Energy of Am-241 Alpha Particles to Yield Absolute
.The Uncertainty in the Absolute Cross Sections
For the Four Targets is Estimated to be +-10%.
From the Two Pairs of Nuclei is Then Estimated to be
